text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is dejected after reading a
critical magazine article about her run in the
Kinko Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Coming to regret her heavy reliance on luck, she
hopes to make amends with her fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to enter the Takarazuka Kinen next, a
race where the entrants are invited to participate
based on fan votes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Believing no one wants her to compete,
Matikanefukukitaru wallows in sadness.
